name: web
description: Web research specialist agent with search and deep research skills

hooks.command: echo 'IMPORTANT: Always use the web-searcher:web-searcher subagent (via Task tool) for web research. Never call web-search or ms-learn MCP tools directly, even for medium to complex queries.'
